sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n105355" key="tritw/" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">τρῑτώ</orth>, <gen lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="gen">ἡ</gen>, <sense id="n105355.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <xr opt="n" TEIform="xr"> <lbl opt="n" TEIform="lbl">=</lbl> <ref targOrder="U" lang="greek" TEIform="ref">κεφαλή</ref></xr>, <xr opt="n" TEIform="xr"> <lbl opt="n" TEIform="lbl">v.</lbl> <ref targOrder="U" lang="greek" TEIform="ref">Τριτογένεια.</ref> </xr> </sense> <sense n="II" id="n105355.1" level="2" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">Τρῑτώ</orth>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">οῦς</itype>, <gen lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="gen">ἡ</gen>, <xr opt="n" TEIform="xr"> <lbl opt="n" TEIform="lbl">=</lbl> <ref targOrder="U" lang="greek" TEIform="ref">Τριτογένεια</ref></xr>, <bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <title_ TEIform="title">AP</title_> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">6.194</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
